creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227494
the screenshot of the error I get

Hello.

I would like to install FreeBSD 14.current,so I've downloaded this file :

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/14.0/FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20210826-8d7cd10ba63-248938-disc1.iso


and I've dded the image to an usb stick with the following command :


dd if=FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20210826-8d7cd10ba63-248938-disc1.iso of=/dev/da0 bs=1m


I haven't got errors,so I've rebooted the PC and I've booted it again using the usb stick. Unfortunately for some unknown reason,the installation can't start because the installer can't grab the needed files from the net and also from the image. I'm not able to understand the reason. Below u can see the error shown for every file that it tries to get....and this error is present inside each image files of the 14-current...
